headlines.title: President Trump Urges Allies to Send Warships to Secure Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: President Trump calls on allies like UK, France, Japan, South Korea to deploy warships to protect oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz as Iran orders evacuation of three UAE ports. Threatens global energy supplies amid escalating war. Could draw more nations into naval operations.

framings.angle: Led with Trump ally urging and Iran evacuation of UAE ports vow to retaliate
Emphasized Iran warning evacuation of three major UAE ports in third war week
Highlighted Trump hope for China France Japan South Korea ships on oil route

headlines.title: Iran-Backed Militia Launches Second Attack on U.S. Embassy in Baghdad
headlines.summary: Iran-backed group claims overnight drone strike on U.S. Embassy compound in Baghdad, prompting U.S. order for citizens to leave Iraq. Affects American personnel and regional stability. Signals heightened militia retaliation risks.

framings.angle: Focused on second embassy attack militia claim and U.S. citizen evacuation order
Featured drone video of Kataib Hezbollah FPV strike on Victory Base Baghdad

headlines.title: U.S.-Israeli Strikes Kill at Least 15 People in Isfahan Factory
headlines.summary: Barrage of U.S.-Israeli airstrikes targets factory in Isfahan, killing 15 according to Iranian media. Impacts Iranian industrial sites and civilians nearby. Underscores expansion of strikes deeper into Iran.

headlines.title: NATO Mounts First Coordinated Response After Baltic Sea Cable Severed
headlines.summary: NATO deploys assets following suspected sabotage severing another deep-sea cable in Baltic Sea. Affects critical undersea infrastructure for Europe. Marks alliance shift to hybrid threat defense.

headlines.title: Russian Airstrikes Kill 4 Wound 15 in Kyiv Region as Talks Stall
headlines.summary: Russian strikes hit Kyiv outskirts, killing 4 and wounding 15 after U.S. pauses Ukraine ceasefire talks due to Iran war. Impacts Ukrainian civilians. Prolongs European conflict diversion.

headlines.title: Iranian Missile Shrapnel Burns Cars Overturns Vehicles in Tel Aviv
headlines.summary: Shrapnel from Iranian missile wave burns cars and overturns one in Tel Aviv district. Affects Israeli urban residents. Demonstrates reach of Iranian retaliation into Israel heartland.

headlines.title: Israeli Strike Kills Family in Lebanon as IDF Targets Hezbollah Sites
headlines.summary: Israeli airstrike kills civilian family in Lebanon; IDF claims terrorist infrastructure hit while relatives deny Hezbollah ties. Affects Lebanese border communities. Fuels regional escalation debates.

headlines.title: Israel Allows Palestinians Cross Military Zone to Return Northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Israel permits thousands of displaced Palestinians to cross bisecting military zone into northern Gaza after hostage release deadlock breaks. Affects 2 million Gazans seeking homes. Eases humanitarian crunch temporarily.
headlines.previousContext: Hostage release breakthrough ends deadlock, enabling thousands to stream back on foot through zone
